subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of My heart and He Who is remembered in My soul! The verse of might hath gladdened Me, while the imprisonment of the righteous hath grieved Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حبیب فوادی و المذکور فی قلبی قد سرتنی آیه الاقتدار و کدرنی سجن الابرار و
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
